---
name: "🚨 Report a New Fraud / Scam"
description: Report a previously undocumented fraud, scam campaign or social engineering attempt.
title: "[SCAM]: <Short descriptive title>"
labels:
  - new-scam
  - needs-review
assignees: []
---

# 🚨 New Fraud Intelligence Report

> [!IMPORTANT]
> ## Privacy & GDPR Notice
>
> Before submitting this report, **remove or anonymize** any personally identifiable information (PII).
>
> Examples include, but are not limited to:
>
> - Full names
> - Personal phone numbers
> - Email addresses belonging to victims
> - Postal addresses
> - Government-issued identifiers
> - Banking information
> - Credit card numbers
> - Authentication codes
> - Passwords
> - Faces, profile photos or signatures
>
> This repository exists to document **fraud techniques**, **not victims**.
>
> Reports containing unnecessary personal information may be edited or removed.

---

# 📖 Executive Summary

Provide a short summary of the fraud.

- What happened?
- What was the attacker's goal?
- Why is this scam dangerous?

---

# 🎭 Scam Scenario

Describe the complete scenario.

Example:

1. Initial contact
2. Trust building
3. Manipulation
4. Fake payment
5. Credential theft
6. Financial loss

---

- [ ] Curiosity

- [ ] Fake invoice

- [ ] Fake delivery

# 🚩 Red Flags

Describe all warning signs.

Examples:

- Poor grammar
- Suspicious domain
- URL shortener
- Pressure to act quickly
- Requests for OTP codes
- Requests for banking credentials
- Requests to leave official platform
- Fake payment confirmation

---

# 🖼 Evidence

Attach anonymized screenshots.

Checklist:

- [ ] Faces removed
- [ ] Personal names removed
- [ ] Personal numbers removed
- [ ] Addresses removed
- [ ] Banking information removed

Describe technical observations.

Possible information:

- Redirect chains
- Fake payment pages
- Login forms
- SSL certificate observations
- Domain age
- Hosting provider
- Tracking IDs

# ⚖ Legal & GDPR Declaration

By submitting this report you confirm that:

- [ ] I have removed unnecessary personal information.
- [ ] I understand this repository documents fraud techniques, not victims.
- [ ] I have permission to publish the submitted material or it is publicly available.
- [ ] I understand maintainers may further redact submitted material.
- [ ] To the best of my knowledge, the information is accurate.

---

# 🤖 AI Dataset Consent

To improve cybersecurity research:

- [ ] I consent to this report being included in open datasets.
- [ ] I consent to its use for AI training and fraud detection research.
- [ ] I understand personally identifiable information will be removed whenever possible.

---

# ✅ Submission Checklist

Before submitting:

- [ ] I searched existing reports.
- [ ] This fraud is not already documented.
- [ ] Screenshots are anonymized.
- [ ] Personal information has been removed.
- [ ] The report is technically accurate.
- [ ] The title clearly describes the scam.
- [ ] Indicators of compromise are safe to publish.
- [ ] I have reviewed the GDPR notice.

---

Thank you for helping improve global fraud intelligence.
